## Access

- [ ] YouTube / podcast RSS (read access)
- [ ] TikTok
- [ ] Instagram

- [ ] Threads / X

## Content audit

- [ ] Last 10 long-form URLs collected
- [ ] Transcripts available or Whisper pipeline confirmed
- [ ] Off-limits topics documented
- [ ] Approval workflow: [ ] auto-publish  [ ] batch approval

## Voice system

- [ ] Claude Project created
- [ ] 5–10 voice samples uploaded
- [ ] Custom instructions saved
- [ ] Test run on 1 transcript — output sounds like them

## Clip workflow

- [ ] OpusClip account connected
- [ ] Caption style defined (font, colors, position)
- [ ] Hook format agreed (text overlay vs spoken)

## Sample batch (day 4–5)

- [ ] 3 clips delivered from back-catalog piece
- [ ] 2 written posts delivered
- [ ] Client approved OR auto-publish confirmed

## Go live (day 7)

- [ ] Full week queued in scheduler
- [ ] Client recap email sent
- [ ] Added to weekly Monday workflow calendar

## Ongoing

- [ ] Monday workflow recurring event set
- [ ] Client added to metrics tab in pipeline sheet
- [ ] Monthly strategy call on calendar
